# tidbcloud_member (Data Source)

member data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "email" {
  type     = string
  nullable = false
}

data "tidbcloud_member" "example" {
  email = var.email
}

output "output" {
  value = data.tidbcloud_member.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email address of the member.

### Read-Only

- `first_name` (String) The first name of the member.
- `instance_roles` (Attributes List) The instance-level roles assigned to the member. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_roles))
- `invite_time` (String) The timestamp when the member was invited, in ISO 8601 format.
- `last_login_time` (String) The timestamp when the member last logged in, in ISO 8601 format.
- `last_name` (String) The last name of the member.
- `org_role` (String) The organization-level role assigned to the member.
- `project_roles` (Attributes List) The project-level roles assigned to the member. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--project_roles))
- `status` (String) The current status of the member.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the member.

<a id="nestedatt--instance_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_roles`

Read-Only:

- `rbac_role` (String) The RBAC role assigned.
- `scope_id` (String) The ID of the project or instance to which the role applies.


<a id="nestedatt--project_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `project_roles`

Read-Only:

- `rbac_role` (String) The RBAC role assigned.
- `scope_id` (String) The ID of the project or instance to which the role applies.
